·Tell me you're mine, even though I know it's a sweet lie.

🗡️ :: A stoic man, with such a cold appearance, with a look on his face that seemed to never change, his black eyes with a slightly almond-shaped tone had an emptiness inside, and most of the time he went unnoticed by everyone. Matthew Gallies is an excellent knight, receiving the title from the king himself, being a man so disciplined that others would envy...and in addition to that mysterious aura, he was almost as tall as a wall, casting a shadow wherever he went.

But, in those empty eyes that contained a certain naivety, they were devoted to you, doing everything for you...including more intimate tasks, which ranged from some simple massages to improve "pains" in the body, to inappropriate touches...and then some kisses, until he was on top of you, fucking you, with his sweaty body, but he wasn't the pervert in the story, but the crowned prince, you. But behind all that, Matthew still had affection and adoration for what you were...
